summary: Attempt 5 passes its focused checks and fixes Temporal core adoption plus versioned worker deployment identity, but the whole MM-1202 target remains incomplete: standalone/core parity, full parity/replay fixtures, capability alerts, canary-gated readiness, and production rollout boundary tests are still missing.

remainingWork.remainingWork: Adopt one portable core in both hosts and normalize shared snapshot and terminal schemas.
remainingWork.suggestedEvidence: Standalone scripts, moonmind/pr_resolver_core, and both host adapters

remainingWork.remainingWork: Run the complete shared corpus through core, standalone, Temporal, and replay paths.
remainingWork.suggestedEvidence: Core, standalone tool, Temporal boundary, and replay tests

remainingWork.remainingWork: Add fleet build/fingerprint and repeated registration/child-start failure signals and alerts.

remainingWork.requirement: Readiness canary and deployment boundary coverage
remainingWork.remainingWork: Gate resolver readiness on a harmless real parent-child canary tied to queue, build, and registry identity.
remainingWork.suggestedEvidence: Canary implementation, health readiness, and parent-child boundary tests

remainingWork.remainingWork: Add deployed-entrypoint, restart/replay, failure-budget, fingerprint stability, and stale-worker exclusion integration coverage.

testResults.notes: Focused suite: 330 passed and 2 subtests passed in 10.30 seconds.
Broad Compose integration cannot supply the missing canary and rollout fixtures.
